name: Monday creator outreach
prompt: Source 5 new creators matching KIND2 ICP (haircare, postpartum, perimenopause). Use /skill sales:account-research. Pitch via Gmail Composio. Save to Notion Creator CRM with status=Pitched.

name: Wednesday brief delivery
prompt: For any creator with status=Briefed in Notion this week, send the brief via Gmail. Include voice guide, dos/don'ts, deadline.

name: Friday asset chase
prompt: Chase any creator with deliverable due >2 days ago and not received. Polite Gmail nudge. Update Notion status.

name: Sunday creator performance
prompt: Pull engagement + CTR + Shopify orders by creator discount code (Composio). Update Notion Creator CRM with last 7 days metrics. Identify top + bottom performer.
